CustomField.formula: IF(ISBLANK(AssistantPhone), "", HYPERLINK("tel:" & AssistantPhone, IF(LEFT(AssistantPhone, 3) = "+55", IF(LEN(AssistantPhone) = 14, "+55 (" & MID(AssistantPhone, 4, 2) & ") " & MID(AssistantPhone, 6, 5) & "-" & MID(AssistantPhone, 11, 4), IF(LEN(AssistantPhone) = 13, "+55 (" & MID(AssistantPhone, 4, 2) & ") " & MID(AssistantPhone, 6, 4) & "-" & MID(AssistantPhone, 10, 4), AssistantPhone)), AssistantPhone)) & " " & HYPERLINK("https://wa.me/" & SUBSTITUTE(AssistantPhone, "+", ""), IMAGE("/resource/WhatsAppIcon", "WhatsApp", 20, 20)))
CustomField.label: Telefone do Assistente (exibição)
